name: nmap
description: Network and web service discovery for website and host reconnaissance.

name: masscan
description: High-speed port scanning for large networks and web ranges.

name: nikto
description: Web vulnerability scanner for common website security issues.

name: sqlmap
description: Automated SQL injection and database takeover testing for web forms.

name: gobuster
description: Directory and content enumeration for hidden website paths.

name: wpscan
description: WordPress vulnerability and plugin enumeration.

name: openssl
description: Encrypt or decrypt files securely with OpenSSL using AES or other ciphers.

name: gpg
description: Encrypt, decrypt, sign, and verify files with GPG.

name: steghide
description: Hide or extract secret content from image and audio carriers.

name: zsteg
description: Inspect PNG/BMP images for hidden embedded content.

name: binwalk
description: Detect and extract embedded files from carrier images or binaries.

name: theHarvester
description: Gather email addresses, subdomains, hosts, names and profiles from public sources.

name: sherlock
description: Search for a username across hundreds of social networks.

name: recon-ng
description: Run Recon-ng modules for domain, email, username, and profile intelligence gathering.

name: metagoofil
description: Extract metadata from public documents to reveal usernames, emails, and server details.

name: exiftool
description: Inspect image metadata and extract hidden information from profile pictures.

name: snort
description: Network IDS for detecting exploit traffic and defending web services.

name: suricata
description: IDS/IPS engine for detecting web attacks and malicious payloads.

name: osquery
description: Host visibility for endpoint integrity and file/system monitoring.

name: auditctl
description: Linux audit framework for recording suspicious access and execution.

name: fail2ban-client
description: Automate blocking of repeated malicious login attempts.

name: clamav
description: Malware signature scanning for downloaded files and tool repos.

name: git-clone
description: Clone a GitHub tool repo into the lab workspace for customization.

name: python
description: Run a Python script or module for custom analysis or malware lab tooling.

name: metasploit
description: Launch Metasploit for exploit development, payload creation, and web exploit testing.

name: setoolkit
description: Social engineering toolkit for phishing and web-based exploit simulations.

name: strings
description: Inspect binary data or malware samples for embedded text and indicators.

name: yara
description: Scan files for malware patterns using YARA rules.
